metadata.title: Quick 2v2 Clash on Split with Sharp Shots and Smart Moves
metadata.description:
Watch a tense 2v2 on Split where timing and positioning turn the tide. Clean shots and smart peeks made the difference here.
What’s your favorite spot to clutch on Split?

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
